title: Vulcanic Snap
excerpt: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
content: These art painting have been hand created a generative adversarial network algorithm trained on Vulcano photos. By applying abstraction, Vulcanic Snap seduces the viewer into a world of ongoing equilibrium and the interval that articulates the stream of daily events.
